sessions.intent: Design LLM module: C# type definition + PLang goal implementation

before.assumptions: Pieces 1-6 done. Runtime1 LLM module is OpenAI-shaped, no tool support. Builder uses two-pass LLM approach. HTTP module available for PLang goals.

sessions.plan: Thin C# action (query.cs, LlmMessage.cs) defines parameters for builder/source generator. Run() calls PLang goal. Provider = setting pointing to goal name (default: OpenAi). Tools are GoalCalls with Description. Tool execution loop in PLang. Future: migrate to pure PLang via define step.

actions.context: Architect plan for LLM module

after.health: Design approved by Ingi. Ready for implementation.
after.notes: Key decisions: no ILlmProvider C# interface, provider is a goal setting, tools are GoalCalls, GoalCall gets Description. Future: define step enables pure PLang modules (separate workstream).

sessions.intent: Design comprehensive test suite for LLM module (query action, provider, tools, caching, streaming, validation)

before.assumptions: Architect v2 plan is the authoritative design. LLM module doesn't exist yet — tests define the contract. HTTP module tests provide the pattern for provider testing with MockHttpMessageHandler.
before.risk: Medium — large surface area. Need to scope carefully: the architect's test suggestions are a starting point, not exhaustive.

sessions.plan: 70 tests across 10 batches: types (8), basic query (8), format/schema (9), caching (6), tool execution (10), callbacks (8), conversation continuity (5), images (3), edge cases (5), PLang integration (8). PLang tests use real OpenAI API. C# tests use MockHttpMessageHandler.

actions.context: 62 C# test stubs across 9 files, covering all LLM module behavior
8 PLang integration test stubs using real OpenAI API

after.health: All 70 test stubs written. Ready for coder to implement LLM module.
after.notes: Added 24 tests beyond architect's 46 suggestions: type serialization, format placement, tool param schemas, validation timing, edge cases. PLang tests will use real OpenAI with future response snapshotting.

sessions.intent: Implement LLM module: types, provider interface, OpenAI provider, make 61 C# tests pass

before.assumptions: Architect v2 plan is authoritative for design. Test-designer v1 has 62 C# test stubs + 8 PLang stubs. HTTP module and provider registry patterns are established. No LLM module code exists yet.
before.risk: Medium — large surface area (types, provider, tool loop, caching, streaming, conversation continuity, images). Tool execution loop is the most complex piece. Cache persistence and streaming need design decisions.

sessions.plan: Create types (LlmMessage, ToolCall), update GoalCall (Description, Parallel), create query action + ILlmProvider, register in engine, implement OpenAiProvider with HTTP via engine.RunAction, cache via SQLite SettingsStore, tool loop, conversation continuity, format/schema handling, images. TDD: implement all test stubs.

actions.context: LLM message and tool call types
Added Description and Parallel properties for LLM tool definitions
Action record and provider interface
Full OpenAI-compatible provider: HTTP, tools, cache, streaming, conversation, format, images
Register ILlmProvider in ResolveType and RegisterDefaults
Implemented all 61 test stubs (removed 1 API key test per owner direction)

after.health: All 61 LLM tests pass. All 1951 project tests pass. Zero failures.
after.notes: Removed MissingApiKey test per Ingi — providers handle auth differently. Cache uses SQLite since Data.Properties is [JsonIgnore]. Streaming is v1 passthrough.

before.assumptions: Coder v1 completed, 61 tests pass. Code follows handler → provider delegation pattern.
before.risk: Low — analysis only, no code changes.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis: OBP compliance, simplification, readability, behavioral reasoning, deletion test. Focus on OpenAiProvider.cs (874 lines).

actions.context: Full 5-pass analysis of all new/modified files

after.health: NEEDS WORK — 3 blocking findings in OpenAiProvider.cs, 6/7 files CLEAN
after.notes: Blocking: 2 bare catches (lines 587, 765), 1 sync-over-async (line 734). Coverage gaps: tool arg defaults untested, type mapping untested. Minor: duplicate httpAction, dead BuildStreamProxy, decomposed params.

sessions.intent: Fix all 8 code analyzer findings in OpenAiProvider.cs

before.assumptions: Code analyzer v1 identified 8 issues. All existing 1951 tests pass. Changes confined to OpenAiProvider.cs + new tests.
before.risk: Low — scoped fixes, no architectural changes.

sessions.plan: Fix 3 critical (bare catches, sync-over-async), 2 moderate (add tests for default param fill-in and type mappings), 3 minor (consolidate httpAction, remove BuildStreamProxy, fix OBP decomposed params).

actions.context: 6 fixes: scoped catches, async ResolveConfig, consolidated httpAction, removed BuildStreamProxy, OBP-compliant ExecuteToolAsync/ToApiMessages/ResolveImage signatures
2 new tests: default parameter fill-in and type schema mappings

after.health: All 1958 tests pass (0 failures). All 8 findings resolved.
after.notes: Removed unused EngineType alias. IPLangFileSystem passed directly to ToApiMessages/ResolveImage instead of full engine.

sessions.intent: Re-review coder v2 fixes for all 8 findings

before.assumptions: Coder v2 claims all 8 findings resolved. 1958 tests pass.

sessions.plan: Verify each of 8 v1 findings, full 5-pass on fix-introduced code, check for regressions.

actions.context: Re-review of fix-introduced code in OpenAiProvider.cs and 2 new tests

after.health: PASS — all 8 findings resolved, no new issues
after.notes: One trivial simplification noted (redundant null ternary at line 148) — not worth a round-trip. Recommend tester next.

sessions.intent: Test quality analysis of LLM module (coder v2)

before.assumptions: Coder v2 claims all 1958 tests pass. Code analyzer v2 approved. OpenAiProvider.cs is the main source file (~847 lines).
before.risk: Low — analysis only, no code changes.

sessions.plan: Run full test suite, collect Cobertura coverage, read all 10 test files + 5 source files, apply false-green hunting techniques (deletion test, weak-assertion scan, mock-level check), write test-report.json.

actions.context: False-green hunting across all LLM test files. Coverage analysis via Cobertura.

after.health: FAIL — 4 major findings, 4 minor. Tests pass but have blind spots.
after.notes: Major: (1) ProviderNotRegistered tests opposite of name, (2) MaxToolCalls unverified, (3) API error assertions weak, (4) OnToolCall callback unverified. Coverage: OpenAiProvider 82.8% line, 61.5% branch. RestoreFromCache and ResolveImage file paths at 0%.

sessions.intent: Fix all 8 tester findings: strengthen assertions, rename false-greens, add coverage

before.assumptions: Tester v2 found 4 major and 4 minor test quality issues. All 1958 tests pass but have blind spots.
before.risk: Low — test-only changes, no production code modified.

sessions.plan: Rename false-green tests, add bound assertions to MaxToolCalls, add Error.Key checks to API error tests, rename OnToolCall test, add mixed-type arg test, add image mime/base64 tests, strengthen cache hit assertions, add parallel result verification.

actions.context: 8 findings fixed: 4 major (rename/strengthen), 4 minor (new tests/assertions). 4 new tests added.

after.health: All 1962 tests pass (0 failures). All 8 tester findings resolved.
after.notes: 4 new tests: mixed JSON type args, parallel tool results, jpg mime type, base64 passthrough.

sessions.intent: Re-verify coder v3 fixes for all 8 tester v2 findings

before.assumptions: Coder v3 claims all 8 findings resolved. 1962 tests pass.

sessions.plan: Run full test suite, run coverage, verify each of 8 findings by reading test code, write test-report.json with verdict.

actions.context: Verified each of 8 findings individually. 7 FIXED, 1 COSMETIC (OnToolCall — documented limitation).

after.health: PASS — 7/8 findings properly fixed, 1 cosmetic, 3 minor non-blocking gaps remain.
after.notes: Coverage improved to 87.6% line / 65.1% branch. RestoreFromCache still 0% (mock-level gap). Recommend security analyst next.

sessions.intent: Security audit of LLM module — tool call loop, image handling, regex, caching, conversation continuity

before.assumptions: LLM module is new code: query action, OpenAiProvider, GoalCall additions. Tool call loop is the critical vector. PLang threat model: .pr files are trusted, user is sovereign.
before.risk: Medium — LLM modules inherently bridge trusted (local goals) and untrusted (external API responses) domains.

sessions.plan: Blue team: map 7 attack surfaces. Red team: exploit sketches for each. Rate against PLang threat model. Key question: can the LLM execute goals not in the declared tool list?

actions.context: Full security audit. Tool whitelist is correct. 2 medium resource-exhaustion findings, 3 low accepted-risk findings.

after.health: PASS — 0 critical, 0 high, 2 medium, 3 low. Tool call whitelist correctly prevents unauthorized goal execution.
after.notes: Medium findings: image ReadAllBytes no size limit (OOM), conversation continuity no length limit. Both are resource limits, not exploits. Recommend auditor next.

sessions.intent: Cross-cutting integrity audit of LLM module — focus on gaps between reviewers

before.assumptions: All three reviewers approved. 1962 tests pass. Code follows established patterns. GoalCall has new properties.
before.risk: Medium — LLM module is new and complex, tool execution loop is the critical path.

sessions.plan: Read all bot reports, review production code for cross-file contracts, trace MaxToolCalls enforcement, check numeric boxing consistency, assess reviewer verdicts.

actions.context: Cross-cutting audit. Found MaxToolCalls batch-overshoot bug and silent empty result on loop exit — both missed by other reviewers.

after.health: FAIL — 2 major, 2 minor, 1 nit. MaxToolCalls enforcement is wrong, loop exit discards content.
after.notes: Cross-file contracts clean. GoalCall additions properly integrated. Recommend sending back to coder for findings #1 and #2.

sessions.intent: Fix all 6 auditor findings: MaxToolCalls overshoot, empty loop exit, numeric boxing, tests, ternary, error surfacing

before.assumptions: Auditor found 2 major bugs (overshoot + empty exit), 2 minor (boxing + test assertions), 2 nits.
before.risk: Medium — MaxToolCalls fix changes execution semantics (fewer tools execute).

sessions.plan: Slice toolCalls to remaining budget, return lastContent+metadata on loop exit, TryGetInt64 in RestoreFromCache, tighten test assertions, simplify ternary, surface parse errors.

actions.context: 6 fixes: tool budget slice, meaningful loop exit, numeric boxing, ternary, parse error surfacing
Tightened MaxToolCalls assertions, added Truncated property checks

after.health: All 1962 tests pass (0 failures). All 6 auditor findings resolved.
after.notes: MaxToolCalls now enforces hard limit on tool executions, not just message appending.

sessions.intent: Recheck coder v4 fixes for all 6 auditor v1 findings

before.assumptions: Coder v4 claims all 6 findings resolved. 1962 tests pass.

sessions.plan: Verify each fix with fresh-code skepticism. Check conversation consistency after slice, lastContent behavior, error propagation path.

actions.context: All 6 fixes verified correct. Conversation consistency maintained after slice. No new issues.

after.health: PASS — all 6 findings resolved, no new issues.
